label: capability search • method • multi-match ranking
query: I have a PDF I need to work with
notes: Probes ranking quality: three PDF-related methods are seeded and the broad query should surface at least two of them. A single-hit pass means the embedder picked one PDF method and dropped the others; we want to see whether the lane preserves multiple related candidates above the acceptance floor.

seedMethods.name: summarize_pdf
seedMethods.description: Generate a summary of the contents of a PDF document

seedMethods.name: extract_pdf_tables
seedMethods.description: Extract tables from a PDF document into structured rows

seedMethods.name: redact_pdf_pii
seedMethods.description: Redact personally identifying information in a PDF document

seedMethods.name: fetch_stock_price
seedMethods.description: Look up the current stock price for a ticker symbol
